meaning: n.运动,移动,运动力,移动力
examples: Flight is the form of locomotion that puts the greatest demands on muscles.
The higher their capacity to bind at the receptors, the higher their ability to stimulate locomotion.

Louboutin, however, is not sympathetic to complaints about the deleterious effects of high heels on locomotion.
